PreToolUse.description: Pre-write gates: (1) ui-gate blocks new UI files without design-system consultation (closes v0.3.1 slop-page bug); (2) whiteboard-gate auto-starts the whiteboard server before writes to .stp/whiteboard-data.json (closes v0.3.0 empty-localhost bug).

PostToolUse.description: Stack-aware type/compile check + AI-slop pattern scanner after editing source files. Anti-slop blocks on 2+ high-confidence findings.

Stop.description: Quality gate: stack-aware type check + tests + unchecked items. Exit 2 blocks stop. 3-attempt max prevents session bricking. Context budget warn fires for balanced/budget profiles when main session approaches max_main_session_kb.

hooks.prompt: Context compaction is about to fire. Commit any uncommitted work now. State saved to .stp/state/state.json. After compaction, run /stp:session continue to resume.

PreCompact.description: Save state to disk before compaction destroys conversation context

hooks.command: rm -f .stp/state/ui-gate-passed 2>/dev/null; bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/migrate-layout.sh" && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/migrate-v1.sh" && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/detect-stack.sh" && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/session-restore.sh" && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/check-project-sync.sh" && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/check-upgrade.sh" &

SessionStart.description: v1 session bootstrap (all idempotent, <300ms combined): wipe UI gate marker, migrate pre-v1 layout, migrate legacy profile names (intended/balanced/budget/sonnet-main → opus-cto/balanced/opus-budget/sonnet-cheap), refresh stack detection (.stp/state/stack.json, skipped if <24h old), restore session context, upgrade check. Forces design re-confirmation on every fresh session.
